# Cartagena Up

A locally verified, bilingual guide to Cartagena, Colombia.
WiFi-tested work spots, current events, and honest beach
logistics — by someone who lives here.

## Work in Cartagena
WiFi-tested cafés and coworking spaces, verified in person.
https://cartagenaup.com/work/

## Esta Semana / This Week
Current events, cultural programming, music, and nightlife.
https://cartagenaup.com/events/

## En Español
https://cartagenaup.com/es/

## Work spots verified
https://cartagenaup.com/work/claustro-la-merced/
https://cartagenaup.com/work/fruto-bendito/
https://cartagenaup.com/work/concreto-bocagrande/
https://cartagenaup.com/work/la-triada-manga/
